sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n77735" key="pappasmo/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">παππασμός</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n77735.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">calling out 'papa'</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
